headline: Less than 1% per Tesla 10-Q; approx 0.11% if valued at $135 IPO price.
filing_fact: Tesla 10-Q says the company invested $2.00B in SpaceX common stock, formerly a preferred share investment in xAI, representing an ownership interest of less than 1%.
model_read: This is not listed as a named holder in the SpaceX S-1/A beneficial ownership table; use as Tesla economic exposure, not control.

relationship: Tesla revenue from SpaceX Megapack purchase
headline: Q1 2026 related-party operating transaction.
filing_fact: Tesla recognized $87M of revenues and $65M of cost of revenues from SpaceX for its purchase of Megapack products in ordinary course.
model_read: Confirms commercial relationship; not equity ownership.

headline: SpaceX related-party capex purchase.
filing_fact: SpaceX S-1/A says the company purchased $506M of Megapack products from Tesla in 2025, recorded in property, plant and equipment.
model_read: Adds related-party/capital-intensity complexity around AI/compute power infrastructure.

headline: SpaceX related-party capex purchase.
filing_fact: SpaceX S-1/A says the company purchased $191M of Megapack products from Tesla in 2024.
model_read: Commercial relationship predates the IPO and xAI consolidation.

headline: Tesla revenue from SpaceX-related commercial arrangements.
filing_fact: Tesla 10-K/A says Tesla recognized approximately $143.3M of revenue in 2025, primarily for vehicle sales, under SpaceX commercial/licensing/support agreements.
model_read: Related-party commercial activity; not proof of material SpaceX equity ownership beyond the separate $2.00B investment.

relationship: Tesla expenses under SpaceX commercial/licensing/support agreements
headline: Tesla expense to SpaceX.
filing_fact: Tesla 10-K/A says Tesla incurred approximately $11.4M of expenses in 2025 under SpaceX commercial/licensing/support agreements.

headline: Tesla expense to SpaceX.
filing_fact: Tesla 10-K/A says SpaceX invoiced Tesla for use of aircraft owned and operated by SpaceX; Tesla incurred about $0.4M in 2025.

headline: Tesla expense to X.
filing_fact: Tesla 10-K/A says Tesla directly or indirectly purchased advertising on X and incurred about $3.3M in 2025.
model_read: Relevant because X became part of xAI, and xAI became part of SpaceX in 2026.

relationship: Tesla revenue from xAI Megapack sales
headline: Tesla revenue from xAI before xAI became SpaceX subsidiary.
filing_fact: Tesla 10-K/A says Tesla recognized approximately $430.1M of revenue in 2025 from xAI, primarily for Megapack products.
model_read: Shows Tesla/xAI commercial relationship feeding into the later SpaceX AI segment.

relationship: Tesla revenue from xAI through February 2026
headline: Tesla revenue from xAI before/around SpaceX xAI acquisition effective date.
filing_fact: Tesla 10-K/A says Tesla recognized approximately $78.1M of revenue through February 2026 from xAI, primarily for Megapack products.

headline: Governance and related-party context.
filing_fact: Tesla 10-K/A describes Musk roles at Tesla, SpaceX, X/xAI, The Boring Company and Neuralink; SpaceX S-1/A shows Musk 84.4% voting control after offering.
model_read: Explains why Tesla says it is presumed to have significant influence over SpaceX for accounting even with less than 1% ownership.
